text.title: strict-mode-required-fields Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for strict-mode-required-fields as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Defining apartment: str = "" (empty-string sentinel) instead of str | None.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Empty string is a valid value, indistinguishable from "explicitly empty". Downstream code cannot tell "field absent" from "field empty"; data quality degrades silently.

failure-mode.description: Using total: int | None for a strict-mode money field.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: int | None allows the model to skip the calculation by emitting null. Use a non-nullable type and pair it with so-08-style refusal handling for the genuine "cannot compute" case.
